description: Documented output contract for scripts/llm-router.sh route-health --json.

top_level_fields.schema_version: integer contract version emitted by the command
top_level_fields.overall_status: ok when no route is unavailable; expected_offline local-only routes are non-fatal office-only states
top_level_fields.providers: current provider probe result keyed by provider name
top_level_fields.routes: task route status keyed by task name

health_cache_fields.generated_at: timestamp recorded by the last doctor run
health_cache_fields.age_seconds: cache age in seconds, null when unknown
health_cache_fields.is_stale: true when cache is missing, unreadable, or older than 300 seconds

route_fields.privacy_tier: external_ok, local_preferred, local_only, or configured policy value
route_fields.configured_providers: providers in policy order after adapter normalization
route_fields.skipped_providers: configured providers skipped because doctor marked them unavailable or expected_offline
route_fields.minimum_successes: required successful provider count for this route
route_fields.policy_violation: null or a route policy violation such as local_only external provider leakage

route_statuses.ok: minimum_successes can be met with currently available providers
route_statuses.expected_offline: route is intentionally local-only or office-only and the only missing provider is marked expected_offline
route_statuses.unavailable: route cannot meet minimum_successes with current provider health

scoring.ok: starts at 100 and subtracts unavailable or expected_offline fallback penalties
